title: Grilled Chicken & Broccoli Bowl
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|2 cups broccoli florets|2 tbsp olive oil|3 cloves garlic|1 tsp salt|0.5 tsp black pepper|1 cup brown rice
directions: 1. Cook brown rice per package instructions. 2. Season chicken with salt, pepper, and minced garlic. 3. Grill chicken 6 min per side until cooked through. 4. Steam broccoli 4 min. 5. Slice chicken and serve over rice with broccoli.

title: Salmon & Quinoa Power Bowl
ingredients: 2 salmon fillets|1 cup quinoa|2 cups spinach|1 avocado|2 tbsp olive oil|1 lemon|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Cook quinoa in 2 cups water, 15 min. 2. Season salmon with salt, pepper, lemon juice. 3. Pan-sear salmon in olive oil 4 min per side. 4. Serve salmon over quinoa with spinach and sliced avocado.

title: Turkey Taco Bowl
ingredients: 400g ground turkey|1 can black beans|1 cup white rice|1 bell pepper|1 onion|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp chili powder|salt|salsa
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Sauté onion and pepper in oil 5 min. 3. Add turkey, brown 8 min. 4. Season with cumin, chili powder, salt. 5. Serve over rice with beans and salsa.
NER: ground turkey|black beans|white rice|bell pepper|onion|olive oil

title: Veggie Stir Fry with Tofu
ingredients: 400g firm tofu|2 cups broccoli|1 bell pepper|1 cup mushrooms|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|3 cloves garlic|1 tsp ginger|1 cup white rice
directions: 1. Press and cube tofu, pan-fry until golden. 2. Cook rice. 3. Stir-fry vegetables with garlic and ginger. 4. Add tofu and soy sauce, toss 2 min. 5. Serve over rice.

title: Beef & Sweet Potato Hash
ingredients: 300g ground beef|2 sweet potatoes|1 onion|2 bell peppers|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp paprika|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Dice sweet potatoes, microwave 5 min. 2. Brown beef in skillet, drain fat. 3. Sauté onion and peppers in oil. 4. Add sweet potatoes and beef, season with paprika, salt, pepper. 5. Cook 5 min more.

title: Lemon Herb Tilapia
ingredients: 4 tilapia fillets|2 lemons|3 tbsp olive oil|4 cloves garlic|1 tsp dried herbs|salt|pepper|2 cups broccoli
directions: 1. Preheat oven 400F. 2. Place tilapia in baking dish, drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, herbs. 3. Bake 15-18 min. 4. Steam broccoli. 5. Serve tilapia with broccoli.

title: Chicken & Vegetable Soup
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|3 carrots|3 celery stalks|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|4 cups chicken broth|1 cup peas|salt|pepper|thyme
directions: 1. Sauté onion, carrots, celery in pot 5 min. 2. Add garlic, cook 1 min. 3. Add chicken, broth, thyme. 4. Simmer 20 min. 5. Remove chicken, shred, return to pot. 6. Add peas, cook 5 min.

title: Black Bean Tacos
ingredients: 2 cans black beans|1 onion|2 bell peppers|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp chili powder|8 corn tortillas|1 avocado|salsa
directions: 1. Sauté onion and peppers 5 min. 2. Add drained beans, cumin, chili powder. 3. Cook 8 min, mash slightly. 4. Serve in tortillas with avocado and salsa.

title: Greek Quinoa Salad
ingredients: 1 cup quinoa|1 cucumber|2 tomatoes|0.5 red onion|100g feta cheese|0.25 cup olive oil|2 tbsp lemon juice|kalamata olives|fresh parsley
directions: 1. Cook and cool quinoa. 2. Dice cucumber, tomatoes, onion. 3. Combine all ingredients. 4. Dress with olive oil and lemon juice. 5. Toss and season.

title: Shrimp Stir Fry
ingredients: 400g shrimp|2 cups broccoli|1 cup snap peas|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|3 cloves garlic|1 tsp ginger|1 cup white rice
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Stir-fry garlic and ginger in oil 1 min. 3. Add broccoli and peas, cook 4 min. 4. Add shrimp, cook 3 min. 5. Add soy sauce, toss, serve over rice.

title: Overnight Oats
ingredients: 1 cup oats|1 cup almond milk|0.5 cup greek yogurt|2 tbsp honey|1 banana|handful blueberries
directions: 1. Combine oats, almond milk, yogurt, honey in jar. 2. Stir well. 3. Refrigerate overnight. 4. Top with banana and blueberries before serving.

title: Egg White Veggie Omelette
ingredients: 4 egg whites|1 cup spinach|0.5 cup mushrooms|0.25 onion|0.25 bell pepper|1 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Whisk egg whites with salt and pepper. 2. Sauté vegetables in oil 3 min. 3. Pour egg whites over vegetables. 4. Cook until set, fold and serve.

title: Chicken Caesar Salad
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|1 head romaine lettuce|50g parmesan|croutons|caesar dressing|2 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Season and grill chicken. 2. Chop romaine. 3. Toss lettuce with dressing. 4. Slice chicken and place on salad. 5. Top with parmesan and croutons.

title: Lentil Dal
ingredients: 1 cup red lentils|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 tsp curry powder|1 tsp cumin|2 tbsp olive oil|coconut milk|salt|1 cup brown rice
directions: 1. Sauté onion and garlic 5 min. 2. Add curry powder and cumin, cook 1 min. 3. Add lentils, tomatoes, coconut milk, simmer 20 min. 4. Serve over rice.

title: Baked Salmon with Asparagus
ingredients: 2 salmon fillets|1 bunch asparagus|2 tbsp olive oil|3 cloves garlic|1 lemon|salt|pepper|fresh dill
directions: 1. Preheat oven 425F. 2. Place salmon and asparagus on sheet pan. 3. Drizzle with olive oil, garlic, lemon juice. 4. Season with salt, pepper, dill. 5. Bake 15 min.

title: Tempeh Stir Fry
ingredients: 300g tempeh|2 cups broccoli|1 cup snap peas|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|3 cloves garlic|1 tbsp honey|1 cup quinoa
directions: 1. Cook quinoa. 2. Cube and pan-fry tempeh until golden. 3. Stir-fry vegetables with garlic. 4. Add tempeh, soy sauce, honey, toss 2 min. 5. Serve over quinoa.

title: Beef & Vegetable Stew
ingredients: 400g ground beef|3 carrots|3 potatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 cups beef broth|1 can tomatoes|1 tsp thyme|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Brown beef in pot, drain. 2. Sauté onion, carrots, garlic 5 min. 3. Add potatoes, tomatoes, broth, thyme. 4. Simmer 25 min until vegetables tender.

title: Chickpea Curry
ingredients: 2 cans chickpeas|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 tbsp olive oil|2 tsp garam masala|1 tsp turmeric|1 can coconut milk|1 cup basmati rice
directions: 1. Sauté onion and garlic. 2. Add spices, cook 1 min. 3. Add tomatoes and coconut milk, simmer 10 min. 4. Add chickpeas, simmer 15 min. 5. Serve over rice.

title: Tuna Avocado Salad
ingredients: 2 cans tuna|2 avocados|1 cucumber|2 tomatoes|0.25 red onion|2 tbsp olive oil|1 lemon|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Drain tuna. 2. Dice avocados, cucumber, tomatoes, onion. 3. Combine all ingredients. 4. Dress with olive oil and lemon juice. 5. Season and serve.

title: Sweet Potato & Black Bean Burrito Bowl
ingredients: 2 sweet potatoes|1 can black beans|1 cup white rice|1 avocado|1 cup corn|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp cumin|salsa|lime
directions: 1. Roast cubed sweet potatoes at 425F 25 min. 2. Cook rice and beans. 3. Assemble bowls with rice, beans, sweet potato, corn, avocado. 4. Top with salsa and lime.

title: Turkey Meatballs with Pasta
ingredients: 400g ground turkey|300g pasta|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 tbsp olive oil|1 egg|breadcrumbs|parmesan|herbs
directions: 1. Mix turkey with egg, breadcrumbs, herbs, form meatballs. 2. Brown meatballs in oil. 3. Make tomato sauce with onion, garlic, tomatoes. 4. Simmer meatballs in sauce 20 min. 5. Serve over pasta.

title: Vegetarian Chili
ingredients: 2 cans kidney beans|1 can black beans|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 bell peppers|3 cloves garlic|2 tbsp olive oil|2 tsp chili powder|1 tsp cumin|corn
directions: 1. Sauté onion, peppers, garlic 5 min. 2. Add chili powder and cumin, cook 1 min. 3. Add beans, tomatoes, corn. 4. Simmer 25 min. 5. Adjust seasoning.

title: Salmon Fried Rice
ingredients: 2 salmon fillets|2 cups white rice|2 eggs|1 cup peas|3 cloves garlic|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|green onions|sesame oil
directions: 1. Cook and cool rice (day-old is best). 2. Cook salmon, flake. 3. Scramble eggs in hot wok. 4. Add rice, peas, garlic, soy sauce. 5. Add flaked salmon, toss.

title: Protein Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup oats|4 egg whites|1 cup greek yogurt|1 banana|1 tsp baking powder|2 tbsp honey|coconut oil
directions: 1. Blend oats into flour. 2. Mix with egg whites, yogurt, banana, baking powder. 3. Cook pancakes in coconut oil 2 min per side. 4. Serve with honey.

title: Chicken Fried Rice
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|2 cups white rice|3 eggs|1 cup peas|3 cloves garlic|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|carrots|onion
directions: 1. Cook and cool rice. 2. Dice and cook chicken. 3. Scramble eggs in wok. 4. Add rice, peas, carrots, onion, garlic, soy sauce. 5. Add chicken, toss.

title: Beef Burrito Bowl
ingredients: 300g ground beef|1 cup white rice|1 can black beans|1 cup corn|1 avocado|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp chili powder|salsa
directions: 1. Cook rice and beans. 2. Brown beef with cumin and chili powder. 3. Assemble bowls with rice, beef, beans, corn, avocado. 4. Top with salsa.

title: Spinach & Mushroom Frittata
ingredients: 6 eggs|2 cups spinach|1 cup mushrooms|0.5 onion|100g mozzarella|2 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Preheat oven 375F. 2. Sauté onion and mushrooms in oven-safe skillet. 3. Add spinach, wilt. 4. Pour beaten eggs over. 5. Top with mozzarella. 6. Bake 15 min.

title: Peanut Noodles with Tofu
ingredients: 300g firm tofu|300g noodles|3 tbsp peanut butter|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp honey|2 cloves garlic|1 tbsp sesame oil|carrots|cucumber
directions: 1. Cook noodles. 2. Pan-fry tofu until golden. 3. Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, honey, garlic, sesame oil. 4. Toss noodles with sauce. 5. Top with tofu, julienned carrots and cucumber.

title: Grilled Chicken Salad
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|4 cups mixed greens|1 cucumber|2 tomatoes|0.5 red onion|1 avocado|2 tbsp olive oil|1 lemon|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Season and grill chicken 6 min per side. 2. Chop vegetables. 3. Slice chicken. 4. Assemble salad with all vegetables. 5. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

title: Coconut Lentil Soup
ingredients: 1 cup red lentils|1 can coconut milk|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 tsp curry powder|2 tbsp olive oil|spinach|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Sauté onion and garlic 5 min. 2. Add curry powder, cook 1 min. 3. Add lentils, tomatoes, coconut milk, 2 cups water. 4. Simmer 20 min. 5. Stir in spinach.

title: Chicken & Sweet Potato Curry
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|2 sweet potatoes|1 can coconut milk|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|2 tsp curry powder|2 tbsp olive oil|spinach|1 cup white rice
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Brown chicken in oil. 3. Sauté onion and garlic. 4. Add curry powder, sweet potatoes, coconut milk. 5. Simmer 20 min. 6. Add spinach, serve over rice.
NER: chicken breast|sweet potato|coconut oil|onion|garlic|olive oil|spinach|white rice

title: Tuna Noodle Casserole
ingredients: 2 cans tuna|300g pasta|1 can mushroom soup|1 cup peas|0.5 onion|100g cheddar cheese|2 tbsp butter|breadcrumbs
directions: 1. Cook pasta. 2. Sauté onion in butter. 3. Mix tuna, pasta, mushroom soup, peas, onion. 4. Transfer to baking dish. 5. Top with cheese and breadcrumbs. 6. Bake 25 min at 375F.

title: Veggie Buddha Bowl
ingredients: 1 cup quinoa|2 cups kale|1 can chickpeas|1 sweet potato|1 avocado|2 tbsp tahini|1 lemon|2 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Roast chickpeas and sweet potato cubes at 400F 25 min. 2. Cook quinoa. 3. Massage kale with olive oil. 4. Assemble bowl. 5. Drizzle with tahini-lemon dressing.

title: Shrimp Tacos
ingredients: 400g shrimp|8 corn tortillas|2 cups cabbage|1 avocado|2 limes|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp chili powder|cilantro|sour cream
directions: 1. Season shrimp with cumin, chili powder, salt. 2. Cook shrimp in oil 2-3 min per side. 3. Warm tortillas. 4. Assemble tacos with shrimp, cabbage, avocado, cilantro.

title: Ground Turkey Stuffed Peppers
ingredients: 300g ground turkey|4 bell peppers|1 cup white rice|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|2 cloves garlic|1 cup mozzarella|2 tbsp olive oil
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Brown turkey with onion and garlic. 3. Mix turkey, rice, tomatoes. 4. Cut tops off peppers, fill with mixture. 5. Top with mozzarella. 6. Bake 30 min at 375F.

title: Tofu Scramble
ingredients: 400g firm tofu|2 cups spinach|0.5 onion|1 bell pepper|1 cup mushrooms|2 tbsp soy sauce|1 tbsp olive oil|turmeric|nutritional yeast
directions: 1. Crumble tofu. 2. Sauté onion, pepper, mushrooms 5 min. 3. Add crumbled tofu, turmeric, soy sauce, nutritional yeast. 4. Cook 5 min. 5. Add spinach, wilt.

title: Egg & Vegetable Breakfast Burrito
ingredients: 4 eggs|2 whole wheat tortillas|0.5 bell pepper|0.5 onion|0.5 cup black beans|1 avocado|1 tbsp olive oil|salsa|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Scramble eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Sauté pepper and onion. 3. Warm beans. 4. Assemble burritos with eggs, vegetables, beans, avocado, salsa.
NER: eggs|whole wheat bread|bell pepper|onion|black beans|avocado|olive oil

title: Baked Chicken Thighs with Roasted Vegetables
ingredients: 4 chicken thighs|2 zucchini|1 bell pepper|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|3 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp paprika|1 tsp oregano|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Preheat oven 425F. 2. Toss vegetables with olive oil, salt, pepper. 3. Season chicken with paprika, oregano. 4. Roast chicken and vegetables together 35-40 min.

title: Almond Butter Smoothie Bowl
ingredients: 1 cup greek yogurt|1 banana|2 tbsp almond butter|1 cup almond milk|1 tbsp honey|granola|berries
directions: 1. Blend yogurt, banana, almond butter, almond milk until smooth. 2. Pour into bowl. 3. Top with granola, berries, and drizzle of honey.

title: Spaghetti Bolognese
ingredients: 400g ground beef|300g pasta|1 can tomatoes|1 onion|3 cloves garlic|3 tbsp olive oil|1 carrot|1 celery stalk|parmesan|herbs
directions: 1. Sauté onion, carrot, celery 8 min. 2. Add garlic, cook 1 min. 3. Brown beef. 4. Add tomatoes and herbs, simmer 30 min. 5. Cook pasta. 6. Serve with parmesan.

title: Zucchini Noodles with Pesto Chicken
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|4 zucchini|3 tbsp pesto|2 tbsp olive oil|1 cup cherry tomatoes|parmesan|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Spiralize zucchini into noodles. 2. Season and grill chicken. 3. Sauté zucchini noodles in olive oil 2-3 min. 4. Slice chicken. 5. Toss noodles with pesto, top with chicken and tomatoes.

title: Mushroom & Spinach Brown Rice Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups brown rice|2 cups mushrooms|3 cups spinach|3 cloves garlic|2 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|2 eggs|sesame seeds
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Sauté garlic and mushrooms in oil 6 min. 3. Add spinach, wilt. 4. Add soy sauce. 5. Fry eggs. 6. Serve over rice with fried egg on top.

title: Chicken & Kale Caesar Wrap
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|4 whole wheat tortillas|2 cups kale|100g parmesan|caesar dressing|2 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Grill seasoned chicken. 2. Massage kale with olive oil until tender. 3. Toss kale with dressing and parmesan. 4. Slice chicken. 5. Assemble wraps.

title: Spicy Tuna Rice Bowl
ingredients: 2 cans tuna|1 cup white rice|1 cucumber|1 avocado|3 tbsp soy sauce|1 tbsp sesame oil|sriracha|green onions
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Mix tuna with soy sauce, sesame oil, sriracha. 3. Dice cucumber and avocado. 4. Assemble bowls with rice, spicy tuna, cucumber, avocado. 5. Top with green onions.

title: Vegetable Frittata
ingredients: 6 eggs|1 zucchini|1 bell pepper|0.5 onion|100g feta|2 tbsp olive oil|salt|pepper|fresh herbs
directions: 1. Preheat oven 375F. 2. Sauté onion, zucchini, pepper in oven-safe skillet 5 min. 3. Whisk eggs, season. 4. Pour over vegetables. 5. Crumble feta on top. 6. Bake 15-20 min.

title: Beef & Broccoli Stir Fry
ingredients: 400g ground beef|3 cups broccoli|3 cloves garlic|3 tbsp soy sauce|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp sesame oil|1 tbsp honey|1 cup white rice
directions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Cook beef in skillet, drain. 3. Sauté garlic and broccoli in olive oil 4 min. 4. Add beef, soy sauce, honey, sesame oil. 5. Toss and serve over rice.

title: Caprese Chicken
ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|2 tomatoes|100g mozzarella|fresh basil|3 tbsp olive oil|2 tbsp balsamic vinegar|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Season and pan-sear chicken 6 min per side. 2. Slice tomatoes and mozzarella. 3. Top chicken with tomato, mozzarella, basil. 4. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic.

title: Walnut & Kale Salad
ingredients: 3 cups kale|0.5 cup walnuts|1 apple|100g feta|0.25 red onion|3 tbsp olive oil|2 tbsp lemon juice|1 tsp honey|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Massage kale with olive oil until tender. 2. Add sliced apple, walnuts, crumbled feta, onion. 3. Whisk lemon juice and honey for dressing. 4. Toss and season.

title: Shrimp & Avocado Salad
ingredients: 400g shrimp|2 avocados|2 tomatoes|1 cucumber|0.5 red onion|2 tbsp olive oil|1 lemon|cilantro|salt|pepper
directions: 1. Cook shrimp in olive oil 2-3 min per side. 2. Dice avocado, tomatoes, cucumber, onion. 3. Combine all ingredients. 4. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, cilantro.

title: Oatmeal with Almond Butter
ingredients: 1.5 cups oats|2 cups almond milk|2 tbsp almond butter|1 banana|1 tbsp honey|cinnamon|chia seeds
directions: 1. Bring almond milk to simmer. 2. Add oats, cook 5 min stirring. 3. Remove from heat. 4. Top with almond butter, sliced banana, honey, cinnamon, chia seeds.
